description: Expandi is a cloud-based LinkedIn automation tool that runs safe connection and follow-up sequences across LinkedIn and email for sales and marketing teams.
overview: Expandi automates LinkedIn connection requests and follow-ups from the cloud, combining LinkedIn and email into one platform with smart, human-like sequences built for safety.
what_is: Expandi is a cloud-based LinkedIn outreach tool that automates connection requests and follow-ups while staying within safe sending limits. It manages LinkedIn and email campaigns in one place and uses sequences designed to behave like a person rather than a bot.

It is a good fit when you want to scale LinkedIn outreach with automatic prospect data and multi-step follow-ups. Campaigns are quick to set up, and it suits agencies and businesses running personalized, omnichannel outreach.

Expandi fits a go-to-market stack as the outreach-automation layer, pairing LinkedIn and email to lift reply rates. It is not a CRM or a data-enrichment tool; it focuses on social selling and lead generation through LinkedIn and email sequences.
